scripts.codegen: sh -c 'if [ -d ../architecture ] && find ../architecture -type f \( -name "*.c4" -o -name "*.likec4" \) | grep -q .; then npx likec4 gen webcomponent -o docs/public/likec4-webcomponent.js ../architecture; else echo "No LikeC4 sources found; skipping architecture webcomponent generation"; fi'
